# Good Lab

Beginner.

20 minutes.

## Setup

1. Prepare the shell.

## Exercise

1. Run the sample.

## Common Failure Modes

| Symptom | Fix |
| --- | --- |
| Missing key | Set the environment variable. |

## Build Notes

Keep the sample small.

## Debrief

- What worked?
